'''Delban Faxicorp''' was a large [[Droid/Legends|droid]] manufacturer that was considered troubled after the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] and collapse of the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]]. Taking advantage of the economic chaos, [[Nimbanel/Legends|Nimbanel]] businessmen and investors purchased a controlling interest in the company. They imposed Nimbanel efficiency on Delban Faxicorp, which became based on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Nimban/Legends|Nimban]], homeworld of the Nimbanel [[Species/Legends|species]].<ref name="Lords of Nal Hutta" / /> It manufactured the [[DBX]] model, which followed the trend of bigger, more imposing droid models that existed before [[Industrial Automaton/Legends|Industrial Automaton]] brought the [[R2-series astromech droid/Legends|R2-series astromech droid]] to market.<ref name="R-Series" />
